title: georgina frustranea
side_effects: Georgina frustranea can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing dizziness, nausea, and stomach pain due to the high concentration of Georginol, a toxic compound found in the plant. Prolonged exposure to Georginol can also lead to respiratory problems, including bronchitis and asthma-like symptoms. In severe cases, improper use of Georgina frustranea can result in seizures, organ damage, and even death. Furthermore, individuals with pre-existing medical conditions, such as hypertension or diabetes, may be more susceptible to the adverse effects of the plant.
